title: Savory Stir Fry
description: Quick and easy stir fry with savory flavors and textures. Serve over rice or noodles for a filling meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the bell peppers and cook until tender, about 4 minutes.
Add the snow peas and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the savory sauce and middle eastern spices. Cook for 1 minute.
Serve the stir fry over cooked rice.
Garnish with additional middle eastern spices if desired.
